title: Gemma Playground: AI Edge Gallery
summary: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma running locally on a Pixel 10 Pro via the Google AI Edge Gallery app. The demo covers image understanding, audio transcription, agent skills for app routing, and multimodal inference all offline without network connectivity.
writeup: Ian Ballantyne demonstrates Gemma running locally on a Pixel 10 Pro through the Google AI Edge Gallery app. The demo shows image understanding, audio transcription, agent skills for app routing, and multimodal inference, all running offline without network connectivity. It illustrates that on-device edge deployment can support multimodal tasks and agent-driven app routing without a server round trip.
